title: 2022 Coolest Tool Award
description: The fourth edition of the Coolest Tool Award happened virtually on Friday, December 16th, 2022. See https://meta.wikimedia.org/wiki/Coolest_Tool_Award/2022 for more details.

tools.name: citationhunt
tools.title: Citation Hunt
tools.description: Citation Hunt is a tool for browsing snippets of Wikipedia articles that lack citations. It is available in several languages and allows browsing snippets either randomly or by their article's categories in a quick and fun way.

tools.name: metawiki-musikanimal-moremenu
tools.title: MoreMenu
tools.description: Extends the "More" menu by adding two more drop-down menus to your menubar.

tools.name: mm_petscan
tools.title: PetScan
tools.description: PetScan can generate lists of Wikipedia (and related projects) pages or Wikidata items that match certain criteria, such as all pages in a certain category, or all items with a certain property. PetScan can also combine some temporary lists (here called 'sources') in various ways, to create a new one.

tools.name: patchdemo
tools.title: Patch demo
tools.description: With Patch demo, you too can spin up a MediaWiki instance running a particular patch from Wikimedia Gerrit.

tools.name: toolforge-bullseye
tools.title: Bullseye: Extended IP info
tools.description: An at-a-glance view of information about an IP address, consolidated from multiple sources

tools.name: toolforge-scholia
tools.title: Wikidata scholarly profile
tools.description: Webservice running Python Flask with scholarly profiles generated via the Wikidata Query Service.

tools.name: viwiki-plantaest-twinklemobile
tools.title: TwinkleMobile
tools.description: Enables Twinkle on mobile view (Minerva skin).

tools.name: openrefine
tools.title: OpenRefine
tools.description: A free data wrangling tool to work with messy data, to clean and improve it, and to connect it with knowledge bases. You can use OpenRefine to (batch) edit Wikidata, to edit and add structured data to files on Wikimedia Commons, and to upload files to Wikimedia Commons.
